description: This file defines an Android activity (MainActivity) that initializes a UI element (TextView) and updates its content with a processed message. It leverages utility classes for string manipulation and splitting, and uses an external library to capitalize the resulting string.

classes.name: MainActivity
classes.description: Android activity that creates and displays a processed message in a TextView.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes the activity and sets up the UI components.

methods.name: buildMessage
methods.description: Builds a message by splitting, joining, and capitalizing text, which is then displayed in the TextView.
